articles.title: US strikes Iran in retaliation for Apache shoot-down - Fox News
articles.description: The U.S. hit 20 targets inside of Iran on Tuesday after Tehran's forces shot down an American Apache helicopter. Both U.S. pilots were saved, but renewed hostilities threaten to derail peace talks.
articles.content: President Donald Trump is continuing to project confidence that a final nuclear agreement with Iran remains within reach despite months of slow-moving diplomacy, unresolved disputes over uranium enri… [+2272 chars]

articles.author: Jordan Blum
articles.title: America’s emergency oil reserve is about to hit its lowest level since Reagan was in office - Fortune
articles.description: The Trump Administration has drained 66 million barrels from the SPR since the war in Iran began.
